title: Orochi’s Rage and Komurasaki’s Defiance
description: On pages 0–4, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3 as The Flower Capital erupts around Orochi and Komurasaki while Luffy is forced into Queen’s brutal prison games.
scene: Sanji, Robin, Nami, and others move through the capital as Orochi’s obsession with Komurasaki turns violent.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Cover Page Request: "Evel and a Frog Blowing Bubbles With Bubblegum." Pen Name - Hong Kong 420 Land

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Your beauty....!! What an absolute waste...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Mythical Zoan SNAKE-SNARE FRUT: You are not

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It almost makes me not want to bite your head off.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: beg me for mercy from the bottom of your heart...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Then I will go easy on you.....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is that because you're so attached to me...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: The one who falls in love first...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Stop it!! Don't Provoke him any further....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Fine. As you wish, Komura- SAK!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: You SHALL DIE BY MY HANDS...!!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Prison and Capital Crisis storyline with 30 dialogue beats. Orochi’s paranoia and Queen’s prison game raise the stakes on both sides of Wano.
